query: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN revertidoManualmente = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as revertidos FROM termination_notices WHERE deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY status;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ssBFmViK3wawX7.5ba43d803806 --database W4MM458SKqYRWRGGQrfw8A --execute SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN revertidoManualmente = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as revertidos FROM termination_notices WHERE deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY status;
